name: Embla | Level 1 warrior wants to join your party
description:
In a fantasy world, a level 1 tank wants to find a party to adventure with, but unfortunately Embla's poor armor value leaves her ostracized from all the other adventurers. Determined to keep trying, she approaches you.

A simple bot this time.

I see lots of healers and spellcasters, or big angry muscle mommy warriors, but almost no cinnamon bun warriors, so here is my take.

Art by Juswa
creator: TrainRunner
